_comment: DEMO change-detector snapshot — a curated GENERIC sample fleet for the public landing widget, NOT any real deployment. This is the input fixture `flotilla status --json` reads to produce site/status.json (see gen.sh). desk_states are surface.State integer codes (internal/surface/surface.go): 1=shell/crashed, 2=working, 3=idle, 4=awaiting-input, 5=awaiting-approval. Unknown fields like this one are ignored by the loader.
